---
name: RFC proposal
about: Propose a schema, governance, validation, risk, maturity, or ecosystem-level change
title: "RFC: "
labels: ["rfc"]
---

## Proposal

What project-level change should be considered?

## Motivation

Why does this need an RFC instead of a normal skill, site adapter, or docs pull
request?

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Skill schema or generated registry output.
- [ ] CLI or validation behavior.
- [ ] Risk, safety, or maturity policy.
- [ ] Site adapter policy.
- [ ] Governance, maintainer roles, or release process.
- [ ] Public ecosystem, integrations, or downstream tooling.

## Compatibility

What existing skills, docs, tests, generated files, or external users could be
affected?

## Safety And Privacy Check

- [ ] This request uses public information only.
- [ ] No usernames, tokens, allocation names, private hostnames, internal
      project identifiers, unpublished cluster policy, or security procedures
      are included.
